title: Progressive Over-Unders
description: Build threshold tolerance with escalating difficulty
purpose: Build threshold tolerance with escalating difficulty

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/3. 75% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 88% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 2:00 at 88%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/15. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/15. 2:00 at 88%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 2:00 at 88%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Set 1: 2:00 at 100%. Sweet spot? Nothing sweet. But it works. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1: 2:00 at 100%. This is your lactate threshold — challenging but repeatable.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Your body knows what to do at threshold. Trust your fitness. Block 1/3.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 1: 100% for 2:00. Like Groundhog Day, but with more lactic acid.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 20% into session. Seated at 85-95 rpm. Stay controlled — smooth is fast.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/15. 2:00 at 88%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 23% complete. Rep 3/15. 88% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 88% for 2:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/15. 88% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Block 1/3. The discomfort is the adaptation. Embrace it. 11 more blocks to build FTP.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/3. 100% at 85-95 rpm, Seated. Sustainable discomfort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Block 1/3. 100% for 2:00. You can hold this. Trust your training.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First block. Sweet spot: called 'sweet' by people who've clearly never done it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 16 minutes in. You're in the zone. Keep breathing rhythmic. Block 1/3.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 5/15. 2:00 at 88%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/3. 88% FTP, Seated. 2:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 88%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 5/15. 88% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 5/15. 88% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 5:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/3. 55% FTP, Seated. 5:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 33% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 41% done. 9 intervals left. 33 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/15. 90-90% FTP, 85-95 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 25 minutes of work done. 33 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/15. 2:00 at 90%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/15. Power: 90-90%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 45% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 31 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 27 minutes in. 105% at 70-80 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 45% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 8 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 45% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 45% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 105%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 8/15. 29 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 8. 14min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 48% through. This is your workout. Own it. 90% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 8/15. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 8. 7 to go. 29 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 51% done. Your mind is weak. Your body is stronger. 27 minutes left.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midpoint: 31 minutes in. 105% at 70-80 rpm. Maximize time at threshold without crossing to VO2.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 51% done. You're not fading, you're adapting. 6 blocks left.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 51% complete. Congratulations! You've found where optimism goes to die.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 51% done. Check your form. Relax shoulders. Maintain 105%.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 90% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 10/15. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 5 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 55% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 10/15. 90% FTP × 2:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. 55%, 85-95 rpm. This is how.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 5:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 5:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 5:00 at 55%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 11/15. 66% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 66% complete. Rep 11/15. 92% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 11/15. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 4 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 11/15. 40 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 4 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 66% into session. 92%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 15/15. Everything you have left. Leave nothing for the cooldown.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 12/15. 2:00 at 108%. Cadence: 90-100 rpm. Seated. 3 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 70% through the session. Every pedal stroke is making you faster. Keep going.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 42 minutes in. Your legs filed a complaint. HR says you're the CEO. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 70% complete. Rep 12/15. Fatigue is real — hold form. 108%, 90-100 rpm.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 13/15. 44 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 13 of 15. Target: 92% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 2 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 73% done. 2 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 73% done. 2 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 13. 2 to go. 14 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 14/15. You're 76% through. The pain hasn't peaked yet. Save nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 76% through session. Rep 14/15. You've done 26min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 1 reps left. 12 minutes total. Your competition quit 20 minutes ago. You're still here.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Deep into it. Your lungs will remember this moment. So will your neighbors from the screaming.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Deep work. 108% for 2:00. Then 0:00 rest. Suffer productively.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 92% for 2:00. Then 10min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 92% × 2:00. Then 10min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 2:00 at 92%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 92% for 2:00. Then 10min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 92% × 2:00. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 50 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 83% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 83% through. This is your workout. Own it. 60% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 83% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
